debug_info.goal:
a b c : ‚Ñù
h‚ÇÄ : 0 < a ‚àß 0 < b ‚àß 0 < c
h‚ÇÅ : c < a + b
h‚ÇÇ : b < a + c
h‚ÇÉ : a < b + c
‚ä¢ 0 ‚â§ a ^ 2 * b * (a - b) + b ^ 2 * c * (b - c) + c ^ 2 * a * (c - a)

proof:
have h_aux : ‚àÄ {x y z : ‚Ñù}, 0 < x ‚Üí 0 < y ‚Üí 0 < z ‚Üí z < x + y ‚Üí y < x + z ‚Üí x < y + z ‚Üí x ‚â• y ‚Üí x ‚â• z ‚Üí 0 ‚â§ x^2 * y * (x - y) + y^2 * z * (y - z) + z^2 * x * (z - x) := by
    intro x y z hx hy hz hxy_z hxz_y hyz_x hxy hxz
    rw [show x^2 * y * (x - y) + y^2 * z * (y - z) + z^2 * x * (z - x) = x * (y - z)^2 * (y + z - x) + y * (x - y) * (x - z) * (x + y - z) by ring]
    apply add_nonneg
    ¬∑ apply mul_nonneg
      ¬∑ apply mul_nonneg
        ¬∑ exact hx.le
        ¬∑ exact pow_two_nonneg (y - z)
      ¬∑ linarith
    ¬∑ apply mul_nonneg
      ¬∑ apply mul_nonneg
        ¬∑ apply mul_nonneg
          ¬∑ exact hy.le
          ¬∑ linarith
        ¬∑ linarith
      ¬∑ linarith
  rcases le_total a b with hab | hba
  ¬∑ rcases le_total b c with hbc | hcb
    ¬∑ rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = c^2 * a * (c - a) + a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) by ring]
      exact h_aux (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
    ¬∑ rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) + a^2 * b * (a - b) by ring]
      exact h_aux (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
  ¬∑ rcases le_total a c with hac | hca
    ¬∑ rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = c^2 * a * (c - a) + a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) by ring]
      exact h_aux (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
    ¬∑ exact h_aux (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
successful_attempts:
